label: trial_02
phase1_raw:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "CommandRouter",
      "purpose": "Parse the input command and route to the appropriate handler",
      "behavior": "Reads the command field from input, selects and invokes the corresponding child function (e.g., create_order, pay_order, etc.), and returns the result.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the create_order command",
      "behavior": "Validates user existence, checks product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, creates an order record, and returns success or failure.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "PayOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the pay_order command",
      "behavior": "Validates order exists and status is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, updates order status to paid, and returns result.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the ship_order command",
      "behavior": "Validates order exists and status is paid, updates status to shipped, and returns result.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the complete_order command",
      "behavior": "Validates order exists and status is shipped, updates status to completed, and returns result.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the cancel_order command",
      "behavior": "Validates order exists and status is pending or paid, restores stock, refunds if paid, updates status to cancelled, and returns result.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the list_orders command",
      "behavior": "Retrieves orders with optional filters by user and status, returns the list.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the get_user_orders command",
      "behavior": "Retrieves all orders for a user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns the data.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListProductsHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle the list_products command",
      "behavior": "Retrieves products with stock, optionally filters low stock, returns the list.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "decomposition_rationale": "The Order Management System handles multiple distinct commands. The CommandRouter acts as the entry point, parsing the command and delegating to specialized handlers. Each handler encapsulates the logic for one command, ensuring separation of concerns and minimal overlap. The handlers are at the same abstraction level and do not call each other, maintaining a tree structure.",
  "dataflow_edges": [
    {
      "from_node": "parent",
      "from_output": "input",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "input",
      "note": "Pass the full input to the router for command parsing."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_data",
      "to_node": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route create_order command data to handler."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_data",
      "to_node": "PayOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route pay_order command data to handler."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_data",
      "to_node": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route ship_order command data to handler."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_data",
      "to_node": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route complete_order command data to handler."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_data",
      "to_node": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route cancel_order command data to handler."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_data",
      "to_node": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route list_orders command data to handler."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_data",
      "to_node": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route get_user_orders command data to handler."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_data",
      "to_node": "ListProductsHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route list_products command data to handler."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Return handler result to router for final output."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "PayOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Return handler result to router."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Return handler result to router."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Return handler result to router."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Return handler result to router."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Return handler result to router."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Return handler result to router."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListProductsHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Return handler result to router."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "output",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Router produces final output for the system."
    }
  ]
}

children.name: CommandRouter
children.purpose: Parse the input command and route to the appropriate handler
children.behavior: Reads the command field from input, selects and invokes the corresponding child function (e.g., create_order, pay_order, etc.), and returns the result.

children.name: CreateOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates user existence, checks product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, creates an order record, and returns success or failure.

children.name: PayOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates order exists and status is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, updates order status to paid, and returns result.

children.name: ShipOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates order exists and status is paid, updates status to shipped, and returns result.

children.name: CompleteOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates order exists and status is shipped, updates status to completed, and returns result.

children.name: CancelOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates order exists and status is pending or paid, restores stock, refunds if paid, updates status to cancelled, and returns result.

children.name: ListOrdersHandler
children.behavior: Retrieves orders with optional filters by user and status, returns the list.

children.name: GetUserOrdersHandler
children.behavior: Retrieves all orders for a user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns the data.

children.name: ListProductsHandler
children.behavior: Retrieves products with stock, optionally filters low stock, returns the list.

phase1_parsed.decomposition_rationale: The Order Management System handles multiple distinct commands. The CommandRouter acts as the entry point, parsing the command and delegating to specialized handlers. Each handler encapsulates the logic for one command, ensuring separation of concerns and minimal overlap. The handlers are at the same abstraction level and do not call each other, maintaining a tree structure.

dataflow_edges.note: Pass the full input to the router for command parsing.
Route create_order command data to handler.
Route pay_order command data to handler.
Route ship_order command data to handler.
Route complete_order command data to handler.
Route cancel_order command data to handler.
Route list_orders command data to handler.
Route get_user_orders command data to handler.
Route list_products command data to handler.
Return handler result to router for final output.
Return handler result to router.
Return handler result to router.
Return handler result to router.
Return handler result to router.
Return handler result to router.
Return handler result to router.
Return handler result to router.
Router produces final output for the system.

children.name: CommandRouter
children.purpose: Parse the input command and route to the appropriate handler
children.behavior: Reads the command field from input, selects and invokes the corresponding child function (e.g., create_order, pay_order, etc.), and returns the result.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: System input with command and order_data fields

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: System output with success, message, and data fields

children.name: CreateOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates user existence, checks product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, creates an order record, and returns success or failure.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data from the command, including user_id and items

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result of the create order operation

children.name: PayOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates order exists and status is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, updates order status to paid, and returns result.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data from the command, including order_id and user_id

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result of the pay order operation

children.name: ShipOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates order exists and status is paid, updates status to shipped, and returns result.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data from the command, including order_id

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result of the ship order operation

children.name: CompleteOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates order exists and status is shipped, updates status to completed, and returns result.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data from the command, including order_id

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result of the complete order operation

children.name: CancelOrderHandler
children.behavior: Validates order exists and status is pending or paid, restores stock, refunds if paid, updates status to cancelled, and returns result.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data from the command, including order_id and user_id

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result of the cancel order operation

children.name: ListOrdersHandler
children.behavior: Retrieves orders with optional filters by user and status, returns the list.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data from the command, including optional user_id and status filters

children.name: GetUserOrdersHandler
children.behavior: Retrieves all orders for a user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns the data.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data from the command, including user_id

children.name: ListProductsHandler
children.behavior: Retrieves products with stock, optionally filters low stock, returns the list.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data from the command, including optional low_stock_threshold
